Sion.trading_pattern: Sion has tankiness and early damage. Play defensive and respect his all-in.
Sion.ability_to_dodge: Sion Q (Decimating Smash) — dodge by stepping to the side.
Sion.early_game: Play defensively. Sion has strong early all-in.
Sion.mid_game: Use E-Q to kite and maintain distance. Scale with team.
Sion.late_game: Both scale. Use your burst to eliminate him.
Sion.win_condition: Survive early, kite with spells. Burst him in teamfights.
Sion.scaling: Sion outscales — his tankiness increases late
Sion.positioning: Keep distance with spells. Use E-Q to kite away.

Malzahar.trading_pattern: Malzahar has sustained damage and CC. Play defensive and respect his ult.
Malzahar.ability_to_dodge: Malzahar E (Void Swarm) — respect his passive shield.
Malzahar.early_game: Play very defensively. Malzahar's sustained damage is strong.
Malzahar.mid_game: Use E-Q to kite away from his ult. Scale with team.
Malzahar.late_game: Both scale. Use your burst to eliminate him.
Malzahar.win_condition: Survive early, kite with spells. Burst him in fights.
Malzahar.scaling: Even — both scale at similar rates
Malzahar.positioning: Keep distance with spells. Use E-Q to kite away.

Annie.trading_pattern: Annie has early burst with Tibbers. Respect her stun and play defensive.
Annie.ability_to_dodge: Annie Q (Disintegrate) — dodge by moving away.
Annie.early_game: Play defensively. Annie has superior burst.
Annie.mid_game: Use E-Q to maintain distance. Scale with team.
Annie.win_condition: Survive early, kite with spells. Burst her in fights.
Annie.scaling: Even — both scale at similar rates
Annie.positioning: Keep distance with spells. Use E-Q to kite away.

Anivia.trading_pattern: Anivia has poke and CC. Play defensive and respect her wall.
Anivia.ability_to_dodge: Anivia Q (Flash Frost) — dodge by stepping back.
Anivia.early_game: Play defensively. Anivia has decent poke.
Anivia.mid_game: Use E-Q to kite and escape. Scale with team.
Anivia.late_game: She outscales in teamfights. Use your burst.
Anivia.win_condition: Survive early, kite with spells. Burst her before wall.
Anivia.scaling: Anivia outscales — her teamfight utility is superior
Anivia.positioning: Keep distance and use E-Q to kite. Avoid walls.

Zoe.trading_pattern: Zoe has poke and CC. Play defensive and respect her Q range.
Zoe.ability_to_dodge: Zoe Q (Paddle Star) — dodge by moving perpendicular.
Zoe.early_game: Play defensively. Zoe has strong poke.
Zoe.mid_game: Use E-Q to maintain distance. Scale with team.
Zoe.win_condition: Survive early, kite with spells. Burst her in fights.
Zoe.scaling: Zoe slightly favored — her poke range is superior
Zoe.positioning: Keep distance and use E-Q to kite.

Azir.trading_pattern: Azir is weak early. Use Q to farm and poke freely.
Azir.ability_to_dodge: Azir soldiers have limited early range.
Azir.early_game: Dominate with Q poke. Azir struggles early.
Azir.mid_game: Maintain pressure. Don't let him free-farm.
Azir.late_game: He outscales. Finish before his control becomes oppressive.
Azir.win_condition: Get an early lead. Finish before Azir scales.
Azir.scaling: Azir outscales — his teamfight control improves late
Azir.positioning: Use Q to farm and poke. Maintain mid control.

Ekko.trading_pattern: Ekko is mobile. Trade when his abilities are down.
Ekko.ability_to_dodge: Ekko W (Parallel Convergence) — dodge the stun zone.
Ekko.early_game: Play defensively. Ekko has decent poke.
Ekko.mid_game: Use E-Q to kite. Both scale.
Ekko.win_condition: Survive early, use E-Q to kite. Burst in fights.
Ekko.scaling: Even — both scale at similar rates
Ekko.positioning: Keep distance with spells. Use E-Q to kite.

Smolder.trading_pattern: Smolder is very weak early. Spam Q and farm.
Smolder.ability_to_dodge: Smolder Q (Breath) — dodge by stepping back.
Smolder.early_game: Dominate with Q spam. Farm freely.
Smolder.mid_game: Maintain pressure. Don't let him scale.
Smolder.late_game: He outscales significantly. Finish before 2-3 items.
Smolder.win_condition: Get a lead and snowball. Finish before Smolder scales.
Smolder.scaling: Smolder significantly outscales — you need a major lead
Smolder.positioning: Use Q to abuse early. Push him off farm.

Sylas.trading_pattern: Sylas is melee. Trade when his abilities are down.
Sylas.ability_to_dodge: Sylas E (Abscond) — when he dashes in, use E-Q to escape.
Sylas.early_game: Trade when vulnerable. Both have similar scaling.
Sylas.mid_game: Use E-Q to kite away. Both scale.
Sylas.win_condition: Survive early, kite with spells. Burst him in fights.
Sylas.scaling: Even — both scale at similar rates
Sylas.positioning: Keep distance and use E-Q to kite away.

Taliyah.trading_pattern: Taliyah has strong waveclear. Farm when her abilities are down.
Taliyah.ability_to_dodge: Taliyah Q (Threaded Volley) — dodge by moving perpendicular.
Taliyah.mid_game: Both have roam potential. Use E-Q for kiting.
Taliyah.win_condition: Survive early, use E-Q to kite. Burst in fights.
Taliyah.scaling: Taliyah slightly favored — her roaming is stronger
Taliyah.positioning: Keep distance and use E-Q. Avoid Q volley lines.

Qiyana.trading_pattern: Qiyana has early burst and CC. Play defensively.
Qiyana.ability_to_dodge: Qiyana E (Audacity) — when she dashes in, use E-Q to escape.
Qiyana.early_game: Play defensively. Qiyana has strong early all-in.
Qiyana.mid_game: Use E-Q to kite. Scale with team.
Qiyana.win_condition: Survive early, kite with spells. Burst in fights.
Qiyana.scaling: Qiyana slightly favored — her early game agency is strong
Qiyana.positioning: Keep distance and use E-Q to kite. Avoid narrow angles.

Orianna.trading_pattern: Orianna has poke and control. Trade when her ball is far.
Orianna.ability_to_dodge: Orianna Q (Command: Attack) — dodge by stepping back.
Orianna.early_game: Mirror her playstyle. Both have similar early game.
Orianna.mid_game: Both scale. Use E-Q to kite.
Orianna.late_game: She outscales slightly. Use your burst.
Orianna.win_condition: Survive early, kite with spells. Burst in fights.
Orianna.scaling: Orianna slightly favored — her teamfight control is superior
Orianna.positioning: Keep distance and use E-Q. Keep away from ball.

Cassiopeia.early_game: Play defensively. Cassio has decent poke.
Cassiopeia.mid_game: Use E-Q to kite. Both scale.
Cassiopeia.win_condition: Survive early, kite with spells. Burst in fights.
Cassiopeia.scaling: Cassiopeia outscales — her sustained damage is overwhelming
Cassiopeia.positioning: Keep distance and use E-Q to kite. Avoid poison.

Zilean.early_game: Play defensively. Zilean has strong early poke.
Zilean.mid_game: Use E-Q to kite. Both scale.
Zilean.late_game: He outscales with utility. Use your burst.
Zilean.win_condition: Survive early, kite with spells. Burst in fights.
Zilean.scaling: Zilean outscales — his utility and poke are superior
Zilean.positioning: Keep distance and use E-Q. Avoid Q zones.

Nunu & Willump.mid_game: Use E-Q to kite. Both scale.

Nunu & Willump.positioning: Keep distance and use E-Q to kite.

Tryndamere.trading_pattern: Tryndamere has early spin damage. Play defensive and avoid trading.
Tryndamere.ability_to_dodge: Tryndamere E (Spinning Slash) — back off when he spins.
Tryndamere.early_game: Play very defensively. Tryndamere dominates early.
Tryndamere.mid_game: Use E-Q to kite away. Both scale.
Tryndamere.late_game: He outscales. Focus on your teamfight impact.
Tryndamere.win_condition: Survive early, kite with spells. Burst in fights.
Tryndamere.scaling: Tryndamere outscales — his scaling is superior
Tryndamere.positioning: Keep distance and use E-Q to kite away.

Ahri.win_condition: Survive early, kite with spells. Burst in fights.
Ahri.scaling: Ahri slightly favored — her mobility is superior

Lux.mid_game: Use E-Q to maintain distance. Both scale.
